candidates.source: WorldQuant 101 paper: mean-reversion discussion and price/return operators
candidates.economic_hypothesis: Temporary stock-specific price pressure reverses after removing broad market movement, especially in liquid names.
candidates.expected_return_driver: Liquidity provision against temporary idiosyncratic order imbalance
candidates.initial_us_equity_universe: Pilot 500 common stocks; price and trailing dollar-volume screen
candidates.security_selection_concept: Rank short-horizon market-residual returns; long losers and short winners with beta and exposure controls
candidates.major_implementation_risk: Costs and stale/missing-price handling can consume a small gross edge

candidates.source: Ang and Bekaert regime-volatility research plus WorldQuant volatility/rank operators
candidates.economic_hypothesis: Investors overpay for high-beta and lottery-like stocks, leaving more stable residual-risk stocks with better risk-adjusted returns.
candidates.expected_return_driver: Low-risk anomaly and avoidance of high-idiosyncratic-volatility securities
candidates.security_selection_concept: Long low residual volatility and short high residual volatility after market-beta estimation
candidates.major_implementation_risk: Can become a disguised low-beta trade and suffer sharp risk-on reversals

candidates.source: Hasanhodzic and Lo hedge fund replication paper and src/replication/clone_model.py
candidates.economic_hypothesis: A material portion of a target strategy return stream can be represented by transparent liquid factor exposures.
candidates.expected_return_driver: Public factor premia and dynamic exposure estimation
candidates.initial_us_equity_universe: Not applicable; liquid multi-asset factor instruments
candidates.security_selection_concept: Rolling regression estimates factor weights; residual alpha is reported separately
candidates.major_implementation_risk: A clone may only repackage beta; true hedge-fund target returns are unavailable

candidates.candidate_name: Equity Overnight-Gap Reversal With Liquidity Controls
candidates.source: WorldQuant 101 open/close mean-reversion concepts
candidates.economic_hypothesis: Large overnight gaps partially reverse when they reflect temporary attention or liquidity shocks rather than durable information.
candidates.expected_return_driver: Correction of temporary overnight price pressure
candidates.initial_us_equity_universe: Pilot 500 liquid common stocks with valid entry prices
candidates.security_selection_concept: Rank prior-close-to-open gaps; fade extremes after excluding abnormal/stale data
candidates.major_implementation_risk: High costs and corporate/news events can dominate the signal

candidates.source: WorldQuant 101 price-volume formulas including Alphas 7, 12, 17 and 43
candidates.economic_hypothesis: Unusually high volume combined with an extreme short-horizon move can reveal temporary forced trading.
candidates.security_selection_concept: Fade extreme returns only when volume is abnormal
candidates.major_implementation_risk: Economically close to Alpha #2 and vulnerable to transaction costs

candidates.source: WorldQuant 101 Alphas 41, 42, 57 and related VWAP formulas
candidates.economic_hypothesis: Close-to-VWAP dislocations can reflect temporary late-session pressure.
candidates.expected_return_driver: Mean reversion toward an execution-volume reference price
candidates.security_selection_concept: Rank close-versus-VWAP dislocation
candidates.major_implementation_risk: Reliable VWAP is unavailable and costs are likely material

candidates.source: WorldQuant 101 industry-neutralized formulas
candidates.economic_hypothesis: Firm-specific information diffuses gradually after removing industry moves.
candidates.security_selection_concept: Rank medium-horizon industry-residual returns
candidates.major_implementation_risk: Point-in-time industry data unavailable; may reduce to simple momentum

candidates.source: WorldQuant 101 high/low/range operators
candidates.economic_hypothesis: Price compression followed by confirmed expansion can reflect delayed information incorporation.
candidates.security_selection_concept: Rank range compression and subsequent expansion
candidates.major_implementation_risk: Can collapse into a basic breakout rule

candidates.source: WorldQuant 101 ensemble principle and ADV discussion
candidates.economic_hypothesis: Combining economically related reversal signals can reduce single-formula noise while liquidity scaling controls capacity.
candidates.security_selection_concept: Blend residual, gap and volume-shock reversal components
candidates.major_implementation_risk: Premature ensemble complexity before component validation

candidates.source: Hasanhodzic and Lo hedge fund replication paper
candidates.economic_hypothesis: Observed long-short equity returns can be decomposed into public beta and residual manager alpha.
candidates.security_selection_concept: Rolling clone of a long-short equity target
candidates.major_implementation_risk: Target returns unavailable and clone may be entirely common beta

candidates.source: Hasanhodzic and Lo managed-futures replication discussion
candidates.economic_hypothesis: Some managed-futures returns can be approximated by dynamic exposures to liquid market factors.
candidates.security_selection_concept: Rolling factor clone
candidates.major_implementation_risk: Linear clone misses nonlinear trend behavior

candidates.source: Hedge fund replication paper and strategy research catalog
candidates.economic_hypothesis: Credit spread carry compensates investors outside stress regimes but suffers asymmetric losses during deterioration.
candidates.security_selection_concept: Hold diversified credit exposure only outside predefined stress
candidates.major_implementation_risk: Likely mostly common beta and ETF timing

candidates.source: Hedge fund replication paper and research catalog
candidates.economic_hypothesis: Convertible returns combine equity, credit, rates and optionality exposures.
candidates.security_selection_concept: Residual after factor hedging
candidates.major_implementation_risk: ETF proxy cannot isolate convertible arbitrage

candidates.source: Hedge fund replication limitations and research catalog
candidates.economic_hypothesis: Deal spreads compensate investors for completion and timing risk.
candidates.security_selection_concept: Select deals by annualized spread and modeled break risk
candidates.major_implementation_risk: Deal data unavailable

candidates.source: Dynamic Asset Allocation Through the Business Cycle paper
candidates.economic_hypothesis: Risk premia vary with growth level and growth direction.
candidates.security_selection_concept: Allocate across asset classes by business-cycle state
candidates.major_implementation_risk: Current fallback becomes simple ETF timing and macro data is unavailable

candidates.source: Ang and Bekaert regime paper
candidates.economic_hypothesis: Expected returns, volatilities and correlations differ persistently across latent regimes.
candidates.security_selection_concept: Allocate using ex-ante regime probabilities
candidates.major_implementation_risk: Primarily an allocation overlay and likely ETF timing

candidates.source: WorldQuant reversal concepts combined with Ang and Bekaert regime evidence
candidates.economic_hypothesis: Residual reversal behaves differently in normal and high-volatility regimes.
candidates.expected_return_driver: Liquidity provision with regime-dependent risk control
candidates.security_selection_concept: Residual reversal with exposure reduced during high-volatility states
candidates.major_implementation_risk: Adds model complexity before base reversal is validated

candidates.source: Hedge fund replication factor decomposition and regime-correlation research
candidates.economic_hypothesis: Stocks with excessive market beta relative to realized fundamentals are overpriced by leverage-constrained demand.
candidates.security_selection_concept: Long low-beta and short high-beta with beta-neutral scaling
candidates.major_implementation_risk: Leverage and financing assumptions are material

candidates.source: WorldQuant alpha-correlation discussion and regime-correlation research
candidates.economic_hypothesis: Stocks experiencing unusually synchronized moves may partially reverse when crowding pressure subsides.
candidates.expected_return_driver: Crowding unwind and temporary common-flow reversal
candidates.security_selection_concept: Identify abnormal correlation and residual-return extremes
candidates.major_implementation_risk: Correlation is unstable and may only flag genuine systemic news

candidates.source: WorldQuant ADV/liquidity discussion
candidates.economic_hypothesis: Securities that maintain price stability during market liquidity stress may earn a distinct resilience premium.
candidates.expected_return_driver: Compensation for liquidity and balance-sheet constraints
candidates.security_selection_concept: Rank price resilience conditional on abnormal market volume/volatility
candidates.major_implementation_risk: May duplicate low-volatility selection

candidates.source: JPM regime paper and strategy research catalog
candidates.economic_hypothesis: Commodity futures carry and inflation regimes create persistent cross-contract return differences.
candidates.expected_return_driver: Roll yield and inflation risk premium
candidates.security_selection_concept: Select commodity contracts by carry conditional on inflation state
candidates.major_implementation_risk: Futures curve data unavailable

candidates.source: Hedge fund replication volatility factor and strategy research catalog
candidates.economic_hypothesis: Volatility insurance earns carry in calm periods but requires explicit crash-risk control.
candidates.security_selection_concept: Harvest carry only under defined term-structure and stress conditions
candidates.major_implementation_risk: Required data and realistic tail modeling unavailable

candidates.source: Ang and Bekaert international regime paper
candidates.economic_hypothesis: International expected returns, volatility and correlations vary across persistent regimes.
candidates.security_selection_concept: Allocate among country markets using ex-ante probabilities
candidates.major_implementation_risk: Current ETF implementation would be simple ETF timing

candidates.source: Boss QuantFin resource extract referencing Microsoft Qlib
candidates.economic_hypothesis: A disciplined experiment framework can evaluate nonlinear cross-sectional signals, but the framework itself is not alpha.
candidates.expected_return_driver: Unspecified until a model hypothesis is frozen
candidates.security_selection_concept: Model-dependent
candidates.major_implementation_risk: Tooling may be mistaken for a strategy and produce black-box recommendations
